article_title: Teen hackers jailed after live streaming cyber attack on TfL

tasks.prompt: What is the main focus of the article?
options: Two young hackers being jailed for the major cyber-attack on Transport for London
TfL launching a new mobile ticketing app
A police investigation into fare evasion
London replacing all Oyster cards with paper tickets
tasks.correct_answer: Two young hackers being jailed for the major cyber-attack on Transport for London
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הכתבה עוסקת בגזר הדין לשני האקרים צעירים שביצעו מתקפת סייבר חמורה על TfL.

tasks.prompt: What sentences were Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair given?
options: Two years each
Five years and six months each
Ten years each
Community service only
tasks.correct_answer: Five years and six months each
tasks.explanation_hebrew: שני הנאשמים נידונו לחמש שנים ושישה חודשים בכלא כל אחד.

tasks.prompt: How did the attackers initially gain access to TfL systems?
options: They stole a server from a station
They tricked a help-desk worker into resetting an employee password
They guessed every passenger's Oyster number
They bought access directly from TfL
tasks.correct_answer: They tricked a help-desk worker into resetting an employee password
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הם התחזו לעובד ושכנעו נציג תמיכה לאפס עבורם את הסיסמה.

tasks.prompt: What was one major consequence for TfL staff?
options: All staff received new laptops
About 27,000 employees had to reset passwords in person
Employees stopped using email permanently
Half the workforce was dismissed
tasks.correct_answer: About 27,000 employees had to reset passwords in person
tasks.explanation_hebrew: כ-27 אלף עובדי TfL נדרשו להגיע ולאפס את הסיסמאות שלהם באופן אישי.

tasks.prompt: In the article, what does 'impersonating' an employee mean?
options: Training an employee
Pretending to be an employee
Reporting an employee
Employing a relative
tasks.explanation_hebrew: impersonating פירושו התחזות לאדם אחר, במקרה זה לעובד TfL.

tasks.prompt: Which sentence best summarizes the scale of the attack?
options: It was a minor website outage with no stolen information
It disrupted services for months, exposed millions of records and cost TfL about £29m
It affected only one ticket machine for an hour
It caused physical damage to Underground trains
tasks.correct_answer: It disrupted services for months, exposed millions of records and cost TfL about £29m
tasks.explanation_hebrew: זהו הסיכום המדויק של היקף הנזק התפעולי, הכספי והפגיעה במידע האישי.

tasks.prompt: Give three consequences of the cyber-attack described in the article.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: יש לציין שלוש תוצאות מהכתבה, כגון גניבת מידע של מיליונים, השבתת מערכות, פגיעה בשירותים, איפוס סיסמאות לעובדים והפסד כספי.
expected_points: Personal data belonging to millions of customers was stolen
TfL online and technology systems were disrupted
About 27,000 employees had to reset passwords in person
Dial-a-Ride and other services were heavily disrupted

tasks.prompt: Why did the attackers begin their operation on a Saturday night?
tasks.rubric_hebrew: יש להסביר שהם רצו לצמצם את הסיכוי שעובדי TfL יבחינו במתקפה במהירות וכך להשיג יותר זמן בתוך המערכות.
expected_points: Fewer staff were likely to be monitoring systems
The timing reduced the chance of rapid detection
It gave the attackers more time to deepen their access

tasks.prompt: Write a 3-4 sentence summary covering the attackers, their method, the damage and the court outcome.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: הסיכום צריך לכלול את Flowers ו-Jubair, התחזות מול מוקד התמיכה, היקף הפגיעה במידע ובמערכות, וגזר הדין.
expected_points: Names or identifies the two young attackers
Describes major disruption, data theft or financial loss

tasks.prompt: Write a short cybersecurity recommendation for an organisation based on the weaknesses exposed by the TfL attack.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: יש להציע צעדים כגון אימות זהות חזק באיפוס סיסמאות, הרשאות מינימליות, ניטור חריגות, תגובה מהירה והדרכת עובדי מוקד.
expected_points: Strengthens identity checks for password resets
Recommends staff training against social engineering
Includes monitoring, access controls or rapid incident response
Connects the recommendation to the attack described
